subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, et al, spoken on 1919-12-30
subcodes.first_line: Sometimes joking is necessary. Otherwise we would get depressed. The Blessed Beauty said, 'In every twenty-four hours, two hours must be spent in a way that will cause happiness.'
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
